title: Coconut Greens Dal
intro: Anna Jones makes vegetables the star. This creamy coconut dal with greens is her kind of food — nourishing and easy. The Thermomix cooks the lentils hands-free.
steps: Chop onion, garlic and ginger 4 sec / 0°C / speed 5. Scrape.
Add coconut oil, turmeric and cumin and sauté 3 min / 120°C / speed 1.
Add lentils, coconut milk and water. Cook 22 min / 100°C / speed 1, basket on the lid.
Add the spinach and cook 3 min / 100°C / Reverse / speed 1. Finish with salt and lime.
tips: Stir in a handful of spinach right at the end so it stays green.
Top with toasted coconut and chilli for crunch.

faq.q: Is this the original Anna Jones recipe?
faq.a: No. This is Chef Aly’s independent Thermomix reinterpretation inspired by Anna Jones and coconut dal; it is not endorsed by or affiliated with the chef.

faq.q: Can I make this Coconut Greens Dal in a TM6 or TM7?
faq.a: Yes. The method is written with TM6 and TM7 settings, using metric weights, clear times, temperatures and speeds.

description: A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Anna Jones-style coconut dal: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks.
